Short CV

She was born in 1987 in Ankara. She graduated from Ankara University Prosthetics and Orthotics Program in 2007 and graduated from Haliç University College of Health Sciences Physiotherapy and Rehabilitation in 2014. She has been studying Haliç University Institute of Medical Sciences Physiotherapy and Rehabilitation Master Program. She has been working as Prosthetics and Orthotics Program’s Coordinator since 2015.
